suppress.notes: False positive - not applicable to this project
False positive - not applicable to this project
Bundled inside npm@11 (via @semantic-release/npm), cannot be patched upstream

False positive from declared transitive dependency metadata: commitizen@4.3.1 references lodash@4.17.21, but effective installed version is lodash@4.18.1 via package.json overrides (verified with npm ls).
